name: GIGABYTE B860M DS3H WIFI6E Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - Supports DDR5-9066(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 3x PCIe 4.0 x1 - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-A - 2x DisplayPort 2.1 - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 2.5GbE LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.3
shortName: GIGABYTE B860M DS3H WIFI6E Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851
description: Budget-friendly micro-ATX motherboard for Intel LGA 1851 with DDR5 support, PCIe 5.0, and Wi-Fi 6E.
